profile.name: Snibbi
profile.bio: Building reliable applications with TypeScript, Bun, Docker, and PostgreSQL.

about.title: Building Reliable Software
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with a strong focus on backend development, infrastructure, and developer experience. I enjoy designing maintainable systems, solving complex problems, and building tools that make life easier.
Most of my work revolves around TypeScript, Bun, Docker, PostgreSQL, and modern backend technologies. I'm passionate about clean architecture, best practices, and continuously improving my craft.

list.title: @lilsnibbi/utils
list.description: An NPM package with common utilities, classes and other helpful tools that I use in all of my projects!

list.title: CLI Password Manager
list.description: A sleek, minimal, and highly secure CLI password manager!

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to work together? Send a message and I'll get back to you.
